title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for traveling parents
subtitle: Warm milk anywhere you travel, in minutes
voiceover_20s: No hot water when you're out with baby? Hunting for a microwave on the road is never easy. USB-C rechargeable — warm milk wherever you travel. Rechargeable, compact, and easy to pack in your bag. Save this for your next trip with baby.

storyboard.visual: 机场旅途出行：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: No hot water when you're out with baby?
storyboard.subtitle_en: No hot water when you're out with baby?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 机场旅途出行：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：0-12月新手爸妈、经常带娃出门、坐飞机；场景：机场旅途出行（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶，圆柱杯体）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、奶瓶插入杯口、奶瓶浸在杯中加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器）；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook shot opening, airport or travel trip, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: No hot water when you're out with baby?
